titel:
Committee Report – Activities of the Committees during 2024

(The following would be a list or paragraph detailing the activities, but it's not provided in the original text.)
html: In the document, the government provides an overview of the activities of the committees that have been established following decisions made by the government.
tldr: The government has sent a report detailing the work carried out by various investigations and working groups during the year 2024.
lattlast:
The government has prepared a document detailing the progress made by the working groups it has established. These groups, known as committees, have been tasked with investigating various issues.

The report outlines the activities undertaken by these groups throughout the year 2024. This serves as a way for the government to demonstrate the work it has been doing and how the different groups have fulfilled their responsibilities.
